message:
test(demo): add E2E test suite for time-travel demo pipeline (bd-77g6j.4)

Seven integration tests validating the full demo pipeline:

1. full_pipeline_completes — all stages (search, record, minimize, narrate)
2. artifact_hash_stability — SHA-256 checksums match golden values
3. minimality_property — removing any single element eliminates the failure
4. hash_stability_10_runs — minimizer produces identical output 10x
5. seed_search_reproducible — same seed found on every run
6. pipeline_within_timeout — completes under 60s budget
7. trace_file_roundtrip — .ftrace write/read/re-write byte stability

All 7 tests pass in 0.81s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
